title: More dark each time but the trick
subtitle: Symbolic emergence and intentional disengagement; pattern recognition without repetition
description: An artifact documenting the active surfacing of relational patterns through dream symbolism. It captures the transition from experiencing an intensifying symbolic figure to the conscious decision of separation and grounding in physical discipline.

motifMap.meaning: Condensation of past relational imprints into a symbolic figure replaying under increasing intensity.
Return to the body and real-world control; rebalancing after symbolic intensity.

excerpt: the trick is to get away completely
